name.ja: <ruby>祟<rt>タタ</rt></ruby>リ<ruby>紙<rt>ガミ</rt></ruby>ノ<ruby>報<rt>ムク</rt></ruby>イ

text.en: Target 1 monster you control and 1 face-up card your opponent controls; destroy your monster, and if you do, negate the effects of that opponent's card until the end of this turn. If this Set card is sent to the GY: You can target 1 face-up card your opponent controls; negate its effects. You can only use each effect of "Cursed Paper Retribution" once per turn.
